pi_items.source: Confirmed via export_result.sh and verifier.py which check this exact path for the expected modified .ork file.
Confirmed via export_result.sh and verifier.py which expect the Design Report PDF at this location.
Confirmed via export_result.sh and verifier.py which expect the Fin Alignment Guide PDF at this location.
Confirmed via setup_task.sh which explicitly copies simple_model_rocket.ork from data/rockets/ as the starting file.
Confirmed via verifier.py scoring logic, which validates successful output against this threshold.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a real, official example rocket design ('A simple model rocket.ork') originally downloaded from the OpenRocket GitHub repository. The required output files must exactly be placed at '/home/ga/Documents/rockets/cdr_rocket.ork' (modified rocket), '/home/ga/Documents/exports/design_report.pdf' (design report), and '/home/ga/Documents/exports/fin_alignment_guide.pdf' (fin alignment guide). Successful completion requires a score of 60 based on verifying these outputs and specific component color changes.
